sections.paragraph:
χηροσύνη (χήρα; Appolon. Rhod.; Manetho, Apotelesmatica) lit. a condition of deprivation or bereavement, then widowhood κόψομαι τὴν χηροσύνην μου I will lament my widowhood GJs 2:1.—DELG s.v. χήρα.

Manetho Manetho , hist., III b.c.—List 5

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1084
